title: Jono Dunn
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type= |image= |name=Jono Dunn |homeworld=[[Gala]]''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Mark of the Crown]]'' |birth=[[57 BBY/Legends|57 BBY]] |death= |species=[[Galacian]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Beju-Tallah dynasty]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Once Deca Brun is elected, he will hire his people as servants. And where will I go? What will I do? Should I have to become like everyone else? Yes, I am a servant. But I live in a palace!''"
"''Jono, I trusted you.''"
"''Then you made a mistake. You are my friend. I like you, Obi-Wan. But I guess I like living in a palace more.|Jono Dunn and Obi-Wan Kenobi|}} '''Jono Dunn''' was a [[Galacian]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who lived on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Gala]], serving as an attendant to the [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] [[Veda (Galacian)|Veda]] in her royal palace. He had been raised in a family that had been loyal to the [[Beju-Tallah dynasty]], and would always serve them. Dunn considered his life in the palace to be extremely prestigious, and would seek to retain his position there at all costs. When [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and Obi-Wan Kenobi visited Gala, they found that the queen was being poisoned by an unknown source. Obi-Wan Kenobi eventually discovered that Jono had been secretly poisoning the queen, under the orders of [[Beju]] and [[Lonnag Giba]], in order to maintain his position in the palace. Beju and Giba, with Jono's testimony, were found guilty of trying to remove the queen from power, and [[Wila Prammi]] was elected [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] of Gala in their place. Jono was sent back to his family by Queen Veda to learn farming as a punishment. ==Appearances== *''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Mark of the Crown]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Jono Dunn#legends |es=Jono Dunn }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Dunn, Jono}} [[Category:Galacians]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Servants]]
